item.title: Why parallel LEDs would not blink when using a 556 timer
item.description: Investigating a warning light subcircuit: Parallel LEDs did not blink due to incorrect circuit configuration regarding the operation of the 556 timer.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am Severin Vire, a first-year engineering student at Monash University.

This blog is a space for me to share technical insights, learning journey, and reflect on engineering challenges. All technical content, including code, circuit designs, and project documentation, is my own original work.

View more on GitHub: https://github.com/severinvire/engineering-log

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/severin-vire-001439374

Email: severinvire@gmail.com
